name: chat-sidebar-server
description: Backend for the cBioPortal chat sidebar. Fetches paper text from PMC/PubMed and proxies Claude API calls.

scripts.vercel-build: cd ../.. && pnpm --filter chat-sidebar build && rm -rf packages/chat-sidebar-server/public && mkdir -p packages/chat-sidebar-server/public && cp -R packages/chat-sidebar/dist/. packages/chat-sidebar-server/public/
